articles.description: Arjun Sampath of Indu Makkal Katchi also claims to have reliably learnt that 90% of nominations filed so far in the 44 reserved constituencies in Tamil Nadu are by Christians

articles.title: Uttar Pradesh top performer under PM’s solar power scheme: UPNEDA
articles.description: As per the national portal, Uttar Pradesh has achieved 4,48,233 cumulative rooftop solar installations, placing it third in India

articles.title: Chhattisgarh: Bijapur looks to future without Maoist shadow
articles.description: For the first time in over six decades, the country appears free of Maoist control.

dailyNews.title: Trump Speech highlights: What US President said about Iran war ‘ending’? What it means for you?
dailyNews.description: President Trump addressed the rationale for the war against Iran, emphasising the need for military action for national security. He provided few new details and indicated no immediate end to the conflict, which could lead to inflation and rising prices for consumers.

dailyNews.title: ‘More confusion than clarity’: Analysts question Trump’s Iran war messaging in televised address
dailyNews.description: In the 19-minute-long televised address, while Trump spoke about almost completing the war objectives in Iran, he also threatened that Washington would strike Iran ‘extremely hard’ over the next two to three ⁠weeks and hit the country into the ‘Stone Ages.’

dailyNews.title: Local Dem leader says he was not 'an aggressor' after arrest for hitting man with bullhorn at 'No Kings' rally
dailyNews.description: The Hernando County, Florida, Democratic Party chair says he did not act as an aggressor after allegedly hitting a man with a bullhorn at a "No Kings" protest.

dailyNews.title: 7-month-old baby killed by stray bullet in Brooklyn shooting, police say
dailyNews.description: Seven-month-old Kaori Patterson-Moore was killed by a stray bullet in Brooklyn after a gunman on a moped opened fire on a crowded street, police say.

dailyNews.title: NYPD cop's killer convicted of manslaughter, not guilty of murder after split jury ordered to deliberate more
dailyNews.description: The man charged for killing NYPD Detective Jonathan Diller during a 2024 Queens traffic stop was convicted of manslaughter but acquitted of murder.

dailyNews.title: Sham Philadelphia coffee shop hiding crack operation busted in sweeping raid, 17 arrested: AG
dailyNews.description: Philadelphia officials dismantled a drug ring at a sham coffee shop in 'Operation Cocaine and Coffee,' arresting 17 and seizing 27 guns and drugs.

dailyNews.title: Former Cowboys player Trysten Hill appears to grin after arrest tied to alleged assault of pregnant woman
dailyNews.description: Former NFL player Trysten Hill was taken into custody in Ellis County, Texas, on charges of assaulting a pregnant woman and interfering with an emergency request for assistance.

dailyNews.title: Behind the scenes of Congress' eleventh-hour rush to fund the DHS
dailyNews.description: Congress used voice votes and rare procedural maneuvers to end the six-week DHS shutdown, with the House ultimately accepting the Senate-passed bill.

dailyNews.description: Trump declares Iran "no longer a threat" after a 32-day military campaign, claiming nuclear sites were destroyed by B-2 bombers and warning of more strikes.

dailyNews.description: Billy Porter said the era of "performative wokeness" is over and arts job opportunities are drying up, speaking out on the shifting entertainment landscape.

dailyNews.description: The Strait of Hormuz crisis exposed NATO's deep fault lines as Germany refused to act and Spain denied airspace, revealing burden-sharing failures.

dailyNews.description: As the shutdown hits day 46, the Trump administration offered rare tax relief to DHS workers still reporting without pay, waiving penalties and interest.

dailyNews.title: 5 Takeaways From Trump’s Address on Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump did not define a clear path out of the conflict, which he estimated would end within three weeks.

dailyNews.title: Trump Initially Laid Out Five Goals for the Iran War. Here’s Where They Stand.
dailyNews.description: The United States and Israel have done significant damage to Iran’s military capabilities. But Iran still fires missiles, has nuclear material and coordinates with militias in the region.

dailyNews.title: Senate and House Republicans Strike Deal to End DHS Shutdown
dailyNews.description: A bill to reopen the department, which the House G.O.P. rejected on Friday, could be approved as early as Thursday. It was a sharp turnaround by the lawmakers and President Trump.

dailyNews.title: Trump Has Discussed Firing Attorney General Pam Bondi
dailyNews.description: President Trump has not made a final decision, but he has floated the idea of replacing Ms. Bondi with Lee Zeldin, the E.P.A. administrator.

dailyNews.title: Key Justices Appear Skeptical of Limiting Birthright Citizenship
dailyNews.description: President Trump appeared in court, watching as members of the court’s conservative majority raised questions about his efforts to limit birthright citizenship.

dailyNews.title: Trump Attends Supreme Court Oral Arguments, Then Leaves an Hour In
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s presence in the court, a presidential first, put him face to face with justices whom he has tried to bully and intimidate.

dailyNews.title: Trump-Backed Candidate in Louisiana Primary Also Praised DEI. Will It Hurt Her?
dailyNews.description: Representative Julia Letlow of Louisiana, running to challenge Senator Bill Cassidy, is facing conservative blowback over remarks from 2020.

dailyNews.title: Iran war's "core strategic objectives are nearing completion," Trump says
dailyNews.description: Trump says he expects the U.S. war with Iran to end within several weeks despite unrelenting attacks from both sides and Iran's iron grip on the Strait of Hormuz.
